title: ERR_NGROK_6022 Issue
excerpt: Hi, I was getting below error, when I was trying to build the reactjs app, I followed the procedure given in the documentation: https://apps.developer.monday.com/docs/quickstart-view. I couldn’t able to see the preview a…

posts.author: Baji (Baji)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I was getting below error, when I was trying to build the reactjs app, I followed the procedure given in the documentation: https://apps.developer.monday.com/docs/quickstart-view. I couldn’t able to see the preview and edit the code.I had opened free ngrok account and installed authtoken, but still I could see the error

ERR_NGROK_6022
Before you can serve HTML content, you must sign up for a free ngrok account and install your authtoken.

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Baji

It looks like this question is about our API.
In this case, I recommend reposting this in the Developers section of the Community.
This section is moderated by our Developer Success team who will be able to better assist.
You can find this section here: monday Apps & Developers - monday Community Forum

Best,

Dani

posts.author: easyascake (Sabih S)
posts.cookedHtml: Check out my answer here: Ngrok Error: Unable to Run Quickstart Guide - #4 by easyascake
